title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 110.
content:
There was an Old Man of Aosta,
    Who possessed a large Cow, but he lost her;
    But they said, "Don't you see,
    She has rushed up a tree?
    You invidious Old Man of Aosta!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 110."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
